market_pulse: Tier-1 venues showing strong weekend momentum with heavy nightclub lineups (Tiësto/Dom Dolla at LIV, Deadmau5 at XS, Lil Wayne at Zouk) and dayclub capacity approaching; OMNIA Dayclub opening May 15th adds significant new competitive pressure.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Saturday Dom Dolla at LIV Nightclub + David Guetta at LIV Beach
Multi-venue heavy talent weekend across all competitors
Sommer Ray & David Guetta drawing influencer-level traffic to LIV Beach
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Push exclusive LIV stories NOW featuring Tiësto + Dom Dolla messaging. Monitor real-time story engagement. Prepare Sunday recap content. URGENT: Ensure LIV social team captures fan-generated content from tonight/tomorrow for Stories + Reels.

content_gaps.description: Competitors aggressively using EDC countdown/hype audio — Zouk, TAO Beach, and Hakkasan all running May 14-17 EDC Week promotions with countdown Reels using high-energy festival audio.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV: Create 3-5 short EDC Week hype Reels with trending festival countdown audio this week. Tag @travelraves @edmidentity. Use 15-20sec cuts.

content_gaps.description: XS, OMNIA, and Encore are posting heavy BTS content (DJ prep, VIP setup, bartender moments). LIV social has lower BTS density.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV: Schedule weekly BTS Stories — DJ booth setups, bartender training, pool deck prep. 3-4 per week minimum across both accounts.

content_gaps.description: @globeth0tter (TikTok creator, 100K+ followers) posted LIV review 5 days ago. No repost/shout from official @livnightclub account detected.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV: Proactively DM/tag micro-influencers posting reviews. Repost UGC Stories weekly. Create 'Tag a friend who needs to see this' engagement loops.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest LIV Nightclub guest list review 5 days ago (591 likes, 61 comments, 'Replying to @Border Brat'). High engagement travel/nightlife audience.
Major Las Vegas nightclub promoter (179K followers) for XS/Encore. Runs heavy guest list + bottle service promotion across platforms.
Edwin Griffiths (LIV promoter) posting frequent guest list/promo content. Heavy engagement on LIV-specific audience.

liv_outreach_targets.relevance: Travel + Vegas nightlife focus. Already organic LIV fan. Audience: 100K+ followers, high engagement.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Reach out for potential collab/guest list partnership. Offer exclusive LIV Beach day experience next week.

Friday May 8 - Sommer Ray; Saturday May 9 - David Guetta. Strong influencer draws.

Opening May 15 at Caesars Palace. 46,000 sq ft pool venue on The Strip. Two central pools, 15 cabanas, 3 bars. Direct competition launching Sunday.

venues.summary: Tiësto tonight (Fri 5/8), Dom Dolla tomorrow (Sat 5/9). Peak weekend momentum, 88K followers, heavy Instagram presence. Globethotter user review detected.

venues.summary: Deadmau5 on May 8 (tonight). 309K followers on IG. Norman Jay (@normanjay_lasvegas) runs promoter content for XS/Encore with 179K followers.

venues.summary: Heavy weekend lineup (Deorro 5/8, Cedric Gervais 5/9). 463K followers. Critical: OMNIA Dayclub opening May 15 represents significant new competitive threat on the Strip.

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA Nightclub TikTok (@omnialasvegas): 327.3K followers, 898.8K likes. Heavy content strategy with nightclub lifestyle, dress code, reviews.

venues.summary: BRAND NEW. Opens May 15, 2026 at Caesars Palace. 46,000 sq ft pool venue with 2 pools, 15 cabanas, 3 bars. CRITICAL COMPETITIVE THREAT launching this Sunday.

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA Dayclub & Skybar opening May 15 at Caesars Palace. Mediterranean-inspired design (Mykonos/St. Barths aesthetic). Opens same weekend as EDC Week. Expected major impact on LIV Beach's dayclub positioning.

venues.summary: Snoop Dogg (5/7), RL Grime (5/8), Lil Wayne (5/9). 248K followers. Heavy EDC Week promotion. Mathame residency active. Strong momentum.

raw_posts.content_summary: Zouk Nightclub discovery page on TikTok with trending nightclub content. User engagement on Zouk-specific hashtags.
Mathame announced first-ever Las Vegas DJ residency at Zouk (Jan 2026). Recurring bookings drive consistent EDM audience draw.

venues.summary: Laidback Luke (5/7), EDC Week focus (Marshmello, DJ Snake). 80,000 sq ft mega-club. Large follower base across Tao Group properties. Solid EDC Week positioning.

raw_posts.content_summary: Hakkasan at MGM programs EDC Week with Marshmello and DJ Snake. Tao Group's primary mega-club. Regular bookings: Lil Jon, Steve Aoki, TWINSICK, DJ Drama.

venues.summary: EDC Week events (May 14-17 programming). Operating since 2025 grand opening. Popular dayclub with Kygo opening, MGK/Sydney Sweeney viral moment. Martin Garrix, Tiësto, Kygo regular bookings.

raw_posts.content_summary: Palm Tree Beach Club at MGM Grand: One of most popular pool parties in Las Vegas/world. May 8 operating (Friday event). EDC Week focus May 14-17. Features world-class DJs (Martin Garrix, Kygo, Tiësto). Industry party Mondays.

venues.summary: EDC Week lineup: Porter Robinson (5/14), DJ Snake + Roz (5/15), Steve Aoki (5/17). 47,000 sq ft pool venue. Asian-inspired bohemian aesthetic. 93K followers. Strong EDC Week positioning.

raw_posts.content_summary: TAO Beach TikTok: EDC WEEK DAY PARTIES posted. Porter Robinson 5/14, DJ Snake w/ Roz 5/15, Steve Aoki 5/17. Heavy festival countdown content.
TAO Beach Instagram: 93K followers, 269 posts. EDC Week promotion and regular dayclub content. Features world-class artists (Tiësto, Alesso, Zedd).
